title: Count Total Number of Colored Cells

testcases.input: n = 1 Output: 1 Explanation: After 1 minute, there is only 1 blue cell, so we return 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: After 1 minute, there is only 1 blue cell, so we return 1.

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: 5 Explanation: After 2 minutes, there are 4 colored cells on the boundary and 1 in the center, so we return 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: After 2 minutes, there are 4 colored cells on the boundary and 1 in the center, so we return 5.
